description: Style NoteA handcrafted product certified by Craftmark, this fabindia stole is crafted from a lovely silk cotton blend. The brand considers forgotten weaving and dyeing techniques from quaint Indian villages and gives it a global twist. Style this stole with your khadi staples or with that pretty summer dress you just bought!Product DetailsCream stole with orange Chanderi print all overMaterial and CareSilk cotton blendDry cleanSizeLength: 160 cm
